response.overview: Konstantinos Argyros: In Motion offers an intimate look into the life and career of one of Greece's most popular contemporary artists. Blending live performances, personal reflections and behind-the-scenes moments, the documentary follows Argyros through the streets of Athens as he shares the people, places and experiences that have shaped his journey. Beyond the stage, viewers discover the man behind the music—as a son, brother, collaborator and performer—while enjoying his greatest hits, exclusive new music and candid insights. Filled with stunning cityscapes, memorable performances and an uplifting message of hope and perseverance, In Motion is a heartfelt portrait of an artist whose life revolves around music.
response.tagline: The Voice. The Journey. The Man Behind the Music.
response.title: Konstantinos Argyros in Motion
